query:
ALTER TABLE orders 
ADD COLUMN customerWechat VARCHAR(100) AFTER customerName,
ADD COLUMN downPayment DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 AFTER courseAmount,
ADD COLUMN finalPayment DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 AFTER downPayment,
ADD COLUMN rechargeAmount DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 AFTER finalPayment,
ADD COLUMN netIncome DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 AFTER accountBalance,
ADD COLUMN confidence DECIMAL(5,2) AFTER status,
ADD COLUMN originalText TEXT AFTER notes;
